label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem step by step. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner: Alice with Jamie, Bob with Patrick, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Melissa, and Eve with Rodrigo. Then there are several partner swaps during the song. The question is asking who Alice ends up with at the end. The options are Jamie, Patrick, Ophelia, Melissa, or Rodrigo. First, I need to track each swap carefully. Let me list out the starting pairs and then go through each swap one by one. Maybe I can make a table or something to keep track. Let's see. Starting pairs: - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Patrick - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Melissa - Eve: Rodrigo Now, the first swap is Dave and Bob switching partners. So Dave's partner was Melissa, and Bob's was Patrick. After swapping, Dave will be with Patrick and Bob will be with Melissa. Let me write that down: After first swap (Dave & Bob switch): - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Ophelia - Dave: Patrick - Eve: Rodrigo Second swap: Claire and Dave switch partners. Claire was with Ophelia, and Dave was with Patrick. After swapping, Claire will be with Patrick and Dave will be with Ophelia. After second swap (Claire & Dave switch): - Alice: Jamie - Bob: Melissa - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Ophelia - Eve: Rodrigo
